1.content:
On the surface, the city looks like your typical booming metropolis. But beneath it all lies a much uglier world that is the true power in this city. A world of crime. You are about to enter that world, and either work your way to the top or die trying. Around here, three families run everything. Each of them have certain members of local businesses, police, even politicians in their pockets. Those three families are...

The Carmella's - Lead by Don Vito Carmella, they control the west side and more than ninety percent of the illegal alcohol that is smuggled into the city. They also have their fingers in the laundering and extortion business as well.

The Angelino's - The head of the family is known as Don Antonio Angelino, whose primary rackets are prostitution and gambling, as well as protection. Their territory is the north side of the city.

The Capponie's - Run by Don Lou Capponie, also known as "Papa Louie". Deals mainly in the drug business, but also has connections in a little of everything else. Controls the east and south side, and is the most powerful and connected of the three families.

Now, this is where your story begins. Choose a family, then a member, and follow their story. Good luck.
1.title: Welcome to Anthrotropolis

11.content:
So, who exactly are you?

Bob Barbieri - Don Carmella's top enforcer. A brute of a hippo that isn't shy about using his strength to get the job done, whether someone needs to be roughed up a bit, or owes money to the Don, Bob makes sure they know their place.

Jim Callanetta - More brain than brawn, which is why this fox was put to work as the Don's concierge. He knows all the family's business records and secrets. Unbeknownst to the Don, Lou Capponie has secretly offered Jim a ridiculous amount to come work for him instead. Will he give in to the temptation despite the risk? Or stay loyal to the family?

Tom Moran - After being in the wrong place at the wrong time, Tom found himself being forced to work for the Carmella's as a driver, smuggling bootleg liquor into the city. This German Shepherd had basically no choice in the matter, but at least they pay him good for his trouble.

Vincent Marone - The Don's personal hitman. Skilled in all manner of assassination methods, this cobra has just been assigned a special mission: Eliminate the other Dons at all costs.
11.title: Carmella's

12.content:
So who are you?

Jimmy Danuke - A doberman that runs a casino owned by the Angelino family. Lately, somebody has been stealing from the house, and the Don has ordered him to find out who. He's on his way to personally deal with the thief, and if they aren't found soon, it's Jimmy that will bear the punishment.

Vicky Vittoria - A beautiful vixen working at a burlesque house as a dancer. Said house is of course, run by the Angelinos. One of the Don's lieutenants often visits, gets drunk, and hits on her, getting more aggressive every night. She's afraid he'll try something drastic, and if he does, she'll have to defend herself. What will happen to her and the other dancers then?

Donny Dratoni - A wannabe thug in school, this cat achieved his dream of finally joining a real gang after being expelled. Started as a bartender for the other members, then worked his way up to made man. Now he's one of the Don's pimps, and is currently in jail waiting to either get out on bail or get busted out.
12.title: Angelino's

info.description:
My friend Nick Knight particularly enjoys my anthro stories, and requested I make one that was based on the Mafia and GTA game series. So, this one's for you, Nick.

Choose between three cities, each set in a different time period, and ruled by a different crime family. Then choose your character and follow their story.

Hope you enjoy, and have fun!
